title: pl-pipeline Adapter Manifest
description: Schema for adapter.yaml - the manifest file at the root of every pl-pipeline adapter package. Declares what the adapter provides (templates/agents/skills/rules/scripts), what it requires (tools, pl/piao version), how it should be auto-detected, and how it integrates with the piao event journal.

apiVersion.description: Manifest schema version. v1 is the only current version.

id.description: Adapter machine ID. Lowercase kebab-case. Must match the package directory name after the 'adapter-' prefix (e.g., id='nextjs-web' → directory 'adapters/adapter-nextjs-web').

description.description: One-paragraph description of what this adapter covers.

version.description: Adapter semver. Independent from pl-core version.

compatible_pl.description: Semver range of pl-core this adapter supports. Standard semver range expression.

compatible_piao.description: Semver range of piao-kernel this adapter relies on. Optional; omit if adapter emits no piao events.

license.description: SPDX license identifier. Defaults to Apache-2.0 if unspecified.

detect.description: Auto-detection rules used by `pl init --smart`. A project matches this adapter if ANY of the listed conditions is true (OR-of-rules). Empty/missing = manual selection only.

file_exists.description: Path relative to target project root. Supports glob.

pyproject_has.description: Key in pyproject.toml tool.poetry.dependencies or project.dependencies (e.g. 'fastapi').

gradle_has.description: String pattern present in build.gradle or build.gradle.kts.

provides.description: Resources this adapter injects into the target host project when installed via `pl init --adapter <id>` or `scripts/adapter-install.sh`. See adapter-injection-contract.md for the full installation protocol.

templates.description: Override/extend pl-core's 7 standard templates. Keys must match pl-core's template names.

spec.description: Path inside adapter package to spec.md override.

agents.description: AI agent prompts to be installed into target project's .codebuddy/agents/ (or IDE-equivalent location per adapter-codebuddy / adapter-cursor / adapter-claude-code).

path.description: Path inside adapter package (relative to adapter root).

id.description: Logical agent id. Defaults to filename stem.

ide_support.description: IDEs this agent is known to work with. Empty = all supported IDEs.

skills.description: Skill markdown files with domain knowledge. Installed to target's .codebuddy/skills/.

triggers.description: Optional keyword list that suggests this skill. Used by IDE adapters to drive skill auto-loading.

rules.description: Coding standards and conventions. Installed to target's .codebuddy/rules/.

scope.description: 'always' = loaded every turn; 'on-demand' = loaded when agent requests or keyword matched.

scripts.description: Shell scripts the adapter provides. Installed to target's scripts/ namespace (prefixed with 'adapter-' to avoid clash with pl-core scripts).

additionalProperties.description: Custom scripts beyond the four standard ones. Key becomes suffix of adapter-<id>-<key>.sh in target project.

build_adapter.description: Build adapter configuration. Provides the commands that pl-core's should-build.sh, pipeline-orchestrator.sh, and future BuildAdapter protocol invoke to check compilation, run tests, lint code. Values are shell command strings executed in target project's root.

type.description: Identifier of the build tool / package manager.

compile_check.description: Fast compile/typecheck command. Invoked by pl-core's \$PL_BUILD_CHECK_CMD environment variable.

smoke.description: Cold-start smoke test configuration (v1.1+, used by pl-core's pl-smoke.sh). Defines how to boot the app, when it's considered ready, and which probes to run. Omit this block to skip SMOKE stage for this adapter.

start_cmd.description: Shell command to boot the application. Should accept $SMOKE_PORT env var.

cwd.description: Working directory relative to $PL_PROJECT. Defaults to $PL_PROJECT.

env.description: Extra environment variables for the boot command.

ready_url.description: HTTP URL to poll until HTTP 200 signals 'app ready'. Usually a /health or /.

probes.description: Ordered list of HTTP probes. Each probe's pass/fail contributes one check.run event to trace.

url.description: Relative path (e.g. /api/v1/users) or absolute URL. $SMOKE_PORT available.

requires.description: Runtime dependencies the target project's environment must satisfy. `pl doctor` will check these.

install_hint.description: Human-readable hint on how to install this tool.

files.description: Files/directories that MUST exist in target project root.

piao_emit.description: Configuration for emitting L1 events to the piao kernel event journal. Omit this block if the adapter does not integrate with piao.

on_stages.description: pl-core stages at whose transitions the adapter should emit artifact.published events.

urn_namespace.description: URN prefix for this adapter's artifacts. Must start with 'urn:piao:artifact:pl:' per convention.

oneOf.description: Full form with success pattern and timeout.

success_pattern.description: Regex pattern matched against stdout/stderr to confirm success (in addition to exit 0).

working_dir.description: Relative to target project root. Defaults to root.
